words.def: a traveler who actively rides an animal (as a horse or camel)
words.zh: n. 騎（馬、腳踏車等）的人( rider的名詞複數 ); 乘客; 附文; 附加條款

words.def: a journey in a vehicle (usually an automobile)
words.zh: n. 騎馬, 乘坐, 乘車, 搭便車

words.def: a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location
words.zh: n. 旁邊, 側, 方面, 脅, 側邊, 血統

words.def: a small cube with 1 to 6 spots on the six faces; used in gambling to generate random numbers
words.zh: vi. 死亡, 消逝, 平息, 熄滅, 漠然, 渴望

words.def: term of address for a man
red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood
words.zh: a. 紅的, 紅色的, 紅腫的, 流血的
